Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.core.seqprover
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AutoTactics
    This class contains static internal classes that implement automatic tactics.
    AutoTactics.AbsractLazilyConstrTactic
    An abstract class that lazily constructs a tactic and avoids reconstructing it every time it is applied.
    AutoTactics.AutoRewriteTac
    Tries to simplify all predicates in a sequent using pre-defined simplification rewritings.
    AutoTactics.ClarifyGoalTac
    Clarifies the goal of the sequent by repeatedly : - splitting conjunctions - simplifying implications and universal quantifiers - discharging sequents with a true goal, a false hypothesis, and where the goal is contained in the hypotheses
    AutoTactics.ConjGoalTac
    Splits a sequent with a conjunctive goal into multiple subgoals.
    AutoTactics.ConjHypTac
    Simplifies a sequent containing (selected) conjunctive hypotheses by separating them.
    AutoTactics.DisjGoalTac
    Replace disjunction occurring at the root of the goal by implication.
    AutoTactics.DTDestrWDTac
    Discharges any sequent that has the form of the WD of a datatype destructor.
    AutoTactics.EqHypTac
    Simplifies a sequent by rewriting all selected hypotheses and the goal using a (selected) hypothesis that is an equality between a free variable and an expression that does not contain the free variable.
    AutoTactics.EqvRewritesGoalAutoTac
    An automatic tactic combining the "RemoveMembership" tactic, and the "Remove Inclusion" tactic to apply on the goal, and looping on all pending nodes.
    AutoTactics.EqvRewritesHypAutoTac
    An automatic tactic to apply "Remove Equivalence" tactic on hypotheses, and looping on all pending nodes.
    AutoTactics.ExistsHypTac
    Simplifies a sequent containing (selected) existentially quantified hypotheses by freeing their bound variables.
    AutoTactics.FalseHypTac
    Discharges any sequent containing a 'false' hypothesis.
    AutoTactics.FindContrHypsTac
    Discharges a sequent by finding contradictory hypotheses.
    AutoTactics.FiniteHypBoundedGoalTac
    Discharges a sequent whose goal states that an expression E has a lower or a upper bound (e.g.
    AutoTactics.FiniteInclusionAutoTac
    Discharges a sequent such as : A⊆B, finite(B) ⊦ finite(A)
    AutoTactics.ForallGoalTac
    Simplifies any sequent with a universally quantified goal by freeing all its bound variables.
    AutoTactics.FunAppInDomGoalAutoTac
     
    AutoTactics.FunGoalTac
    Discharges a sequent whose goal states that an expression is a function (i.e.
    AutoTactics.FunImgInGoalTac
    Discharges any sequent whose goal denotes that a functional image belongs to a set when this can be derived from the function properties.
    AutoTactics.FunImgSimpTac
    Simplifies expressions of form '(A <<| f)(C)' and similar, where f is known as a partial function.
    AutoTactics.FunOvrGoalTac
    Applies automatically, repeatedly and recursively the FunOvrGoalOnceTac to the proof subtree rooted at the given node.
    AutoTactics.FunOvrHypTac
    Applies automatically, repeatedly and recursively the FunOvrHypOnceTac to the proof subtree rooted at the given node.
    AutoTactics.GenMPTac
    Simplifies the visible hypotheses and goal in a sequent by replacing sub-predicates P by ⊤ (or ⊥) if P (or ¬P) appears as hypothesis (global and local).
    AutoTactics.GoalDisjInHypTac
    Discharges any sequent whose goal is a disjunction and one of whose disjuncts is present in the hypotheses.
    AutoTactics.GoalInHypTac
    Discharges any sequent whose goal is present in its hypotheses.
    AutoTactics.ImpGoalTac
    Simplifies any sequent with an implicative goal by adding the left hand side of the implication to the hypotheses and making its right hand side the new goal.
    AutoTactics.InDomGoalTac
    Discharges any sequent whose goal denotes a membership to a domain the value of which is known.
    AutoTactics.LassoTac
    The lasso tactic.
    AutoTactics.MapOvrGoalAutoTac
    Remove mapplet overriding of total function in goal (f<+{x↦y}∈A→B).
    AutoTactics.MembershipGoalAutoTac
    Auto-tactic to discharge a sequent such as : f(x)∈S, S⊆T ⊦ f(x)∈T
    AutoTactics.NNFRewritesAutoTac
    Puts the sequents of all pending nodes in Negation Normal Form.
    AutoTactics.NotEmptyAutoTac
    Replaces a non-empty set hypothesis with an existential.
    AutoTactics.OnePointGoalTac
    Applies automatically the OnePointGoal tactic to the goal.
    AutoTactics.OnePointHypTac
    Applies automatically the OnePointHyp tactic to the selected hypotheses.
    AutoTactics.PartitionRewriteTac
    Simplifies all predicates of the form 'partition(S, ...)' into their expanded form in the goal and all visible hypotheses .
    AutoTactics.RmiGoalAutoTac
    An automatic tactic combining the "RemoveMembership" tactic, and the "Remove Inclusion" tactic to apply on a goal, and looping on all pending sub-nodes.
    AutoTactics.RmiGoalOnceAtRootAutoTac
    The automatic "Remove Membership" tactic to be applied once on a goal if the inclusion is at the root of the goal, for determinism.
    AutoTactics.RmiHypAutoTac
    An automatic tactic combining the "RemoveMembership" tactic, and the "Remove Inclusion" tactic to apply on hypotheses, and looping on all pending nodes.
    AutoTactics.ShrinkEnumHypTac
    Simplifies (selected) hypotheses of the form 'E={a,b,c}' to 'E={a,c}' after finding the hypothesis 'not(E=b)'.
    AutoTactics.ShrinkImpHypTac
    Simplifies the (visible) implicative hypotheses in a sequent by removing predicates from their left hand sides that are (selected) hypotheses.
    AutoTactics.SplitLeftDisjImpHypTac
    Simplifies all (selected) hypotheses of the form 'P \/ Q => R' into multiple implications 'P => R' , 'Q => R'.
    AutoTactics.SplitRightConjImpHypTac
    Simplifies all (selected) hypotheses of the form 'P => Q /\ R' into multiple implications 'P => Q' , 'P => R'.
    AutoTactics.TotalDomToCProdAutoTac
    Re-writes a domain if it can be substituted by a cartesian product.
    AutoTactics.TrueGoalTac
    Discharges any sequent whose goal is 'true'.
    AutoTactics.TypeRewriteTac
    Tries to simplify predicates related to types using pre-defined simplification rewritings.
    DLib
    This is a collection of constants and methods that are used often in relation to the sequent prover.
    Lib
    This is a collection of static constants and methods that are used often in relation to the sequent prover.
    TacticCombinators
    This class contains internal classes for tactic combinators.
    TacticCombinators.Attempt
    The 'attempt' tactic combinator.
    TacticCombinators.AttemptAfterLasso
    Applies given tactic after lasso.
    TacticCombinators.ComposeUntilFailure
    The 'compose until failure' tactic combinator.
    TacticCombinators.ComposeUntilSuccess
    The 'compose until success' tactic combinator.
    TacticCombinators.Loop
    The 'loop' tactic combinator.
    TacticCombinators.LoopOnAllPending
    The 'loop on all pending' tactic combinator.
    TacticCombinators.OnAllPending
    The 'on all pending' tactic combinator.
    TacticCombinators.Sequence
    The 'sequence' tactic combinator.
    Tactics
    This class contains static methods that wrap Event-B reasoner extensions into tactics.
    Tactics.FailureTactic
    The class for "Failure tactic" that always fails.
